title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Unisys India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Unisys India:
Unisys India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India!
